notes: NEW COURSE: European Portuguese (pt-PT) — the Portuguese actually spoken in Portugal, not Brazil. 2,300 words with audio examples, a 105-day guided plan from zero to B2 ending in real CAPLE-style DEPLE and DIPLE mock exams, level quizzes, a placement test, a one-page pronunciation cheatsheet and teach-back concepts. Also new: pick which language(s) send you the daily study reminder — trying a placement test in another language will never sign you up for its nags.
